title: FDA Regulatory Framework
learning_objectives: Navigate the FDA laser product regulatory structure under 21 CFR
Understand the relationship between CDRH, FDA, and regulatory enforcement
Identify key reporting requirements: Product Reports, Supplemental Reports, and Annual Reports
Recognize the historical evolution of FDA laser regulations
Apply compliance timelines to real-world scenarios

prerequisites: Familiarity with general laser safety principles

regulatory_timeline.title: FDA Laser Regulation Milestones
regulatory_timeline.description: Explore the historical development of FDA laser regulations through an interactive timeline

events.description: Theodore Maiman demonstrates the first working laser at Hughes Research Laboratories
First documented case of eye injury from ruby laser in research setting

events.event: Radiation Control for Health and Safety Act
events.description: Congress passes Public Law 90-602, giving FDA authority over electronic product radiation
events.significance: Legal foundation for FDA laser oversight

events.description: 21 CFR 1040.10 and 1040.11 established with Classes I-IV
August 2, 1976 - All laser products manufactured on or after this date must comply
Appendix B added to Compliance Guide clarifying demonstration laser requirements
August 20, 1986 - Class IV laser systems must include manual reset after power failure
Exemption for certain low-power inherently Class I laser products from reporting
First guidance on conformance with IEC 60825-1 Amendment 2
June 24, 2007 - Expanded acceptance of IEC 60825-1 Editions 1.2 and 2
Guidance on conformance with IEC 60825-1 Ed. 3 and IEC 60601-2-22 Ed. 3.1
January 20, 2023 - Amendments to records and reporting requirements, effective February 21, 2023

form_selection_wizard.title: FDA Form Selection Wizard
form_selection_wizard.description: Interactive tool to determine which FDA form to use for your situation
form_selection_wizard.starting_question: What type of laser product action are you taking?

nodes.question: What type of laser product action are you taking?
Is this a completely new product or part of an existing model family?

options.label: Completely new product design
options.result: FORM FDA 3632 - Complete Product Report (21 CFR 1002.10)

options.label: New model in existing model family
options.result: FORM FDA 3632 - Supplemental Report referencing original accession number (21 CFR 1002.11)

options.label: Low-power Class I product (inherently safe)
options.result: May be exempt from Product Report per Laser Notice No. 41 - verify eligibility

nodes.question: Does the modification affect any of the following?

options.label: Actual or potential radiation emission
options.result: FORM FDA 3632 - Supplemental Report REQUIRED (21 CFR 1002.11)

options.label: Degree of compliance with performance standards
options.result: FORM FDA 3632 - Supplemental Report REQUIRED (21 CFR 1002.11)

options.label: Probability of detecting noncompliance
options.result: FORM FDA 3632 - Supplemental Report REQUIRED (21 CFR 1002.11)

options.label: Only cosmetic changes (color, etc.)
options.result: No supplemental report required - document in next Annual Report

options.label: Accidental radiation occurrence (injury or potential)
options.result: Immediate notification to CDRH required (21 CFR 1002.20)

options.label: Product defect affecting radiation safety
options.result: FORM FDA 3633 - Notification of defect (21 CFR 1003.10)

options.label: Product fails to comply with standard
options.result: Immediate notification to CDRH required (21 CFR 1003.10)

nodes.question: What type of variance are you seeking?

options.label: Laser light show demonstration (Class IIIb/IV)
options.result: FORM FDA 3147 - Application for Variance + Laser Light Show Report

options.label: Medical laser product variance
options.result: 21 CFR 1010.4 - Variance application with supporting documentation

options.label: Exemption from reporting/recordkeeping
options.result: 21 CFR 1002.50 - Application with justification for small production or inherently safe products

nodes.result: Annual Report Form - Due September 1 for year ending June 30 (21 CFR 1002.13)
